yaml_definition:
name: list_users
description: Retrieve a list of users from the system with optional filtering capabilities
method: GET
url: /api/users
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: Filter users by name (supports partial match)
      in: query
    email:
      type: string
      description: Filter users by email address
      in: query
    role:
      type: string
      description: Filter users by role (e.g., admin, user, vip)
      in: query
      enum:
        - admin
        - user
        - vip
    phone:
      type: string
      description: Filter users by phone number
      in: query
  required: []
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: array
      description: Array of user objects
      items:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            description: Unique user identifier
          name:
            type: string
            description: User's full name
          email:
            type: string
            description: User's email address
          phone:
            type: string
            description: User's phone number
          address:
            type: string
            description: User's physical address
          role:
            type: string
            description: User's role in the system
          registeredAt:
            type: string
            description: Date when user registered (YYYY-MM-DD format)
    total:
      type: integer
      description: Total number of users matching the query
name: list_users
description: Retrieve a list of users from the system with optional filtering capabilities

name.description: Filter users by name (supports partial match)

role.description: Filter users by role (e.g., admin, user, vip)

total.description: Total number of users matching the query

raw_definition.name: list_users
raw_definition.description: Retrieve a list of users from the system with optional filtering capabilities

name.description: Filter users by name (supports partial match)

role.description: Filter users by role (e.g., admin, user, vip)

total.description: Total number of users matching the query
